title: CVE-2000-0610 — CVSS 5.0 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2000-0610

CVSS Score: 5.0 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2000-06-23T04:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

NetWin dMailWeb and cwMail 2.6g and earlier allows remote attackers to bypass authentication and use the server for mail relay via a username that contains a carriage return.

References: http://archives.neohapsis.com/archives/bugtraq/2000-06/0243.html, http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/1390, https://exchange.xforce.ibmcloud.com/vulnerabilities/4770
